'''chakutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khanjiri|khanjiri]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-k-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khanjiri|khanjiri]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chakutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chækitith|chækitith]] || [[word:chækitij|chækitij]] || [[word:chækitish|chækitish]] || [[word:chækiti|chækiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chakukututh|chakukututh]] || [[word:chakukutuj|chakukutuj]] || [[word:chakukutush|chakukutush]] || [[word:chakukutu|chakukutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chakututh|chakututh]] || [[word:chakutuj|chakutuj]] || [[word:chakutush|chakutush]] || [[word:chakutu|chakutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chakuftuth|chakuftuth]] || [[word:chakuftuj|chakuftuj]] || [[word:chakuftush|chakuftush]] || [[word:chakuftuf|chakuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chakututhu|chakututhu]] || [[word:chakutuju|chakutuju]] || [[word:chakutushu|chakutushu]] || [[word:chakutuku|chakutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chakututh|chakututh]] || [[word:chakutuj|chakutuj]] || [[word:chakutush|chakutush]] || [[word:chakutu|chakutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chakututhul|chakututhul]] || [[word:chakutujul|chakutujul]] || [[word:chakutushul|chakutushul]] || [[word:chakutukul|chakutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chakututhuthu|chakututhuthu]] || [[word:chakutujuju|chakutujuju]] || [[word:chakutushushu|chakutushushu]] || [[word:chakutuku|chakutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chakututhun|chakututhun]] || [[word:chakutujun|chakutujun]] || [[word:chakutushun|chakutushun]] || [[word:chakutukun|chakutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chakututhuoro|chakututhuoro]] || [[word:chakutujuoro|chakutujuoro]] || [[word:chakutushuoro|chakutushuoro]] || [[word:chakutukuoro|chakutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
